TBD.Settings.HpCurrentPath.Name: Current HP data path
TBD.Settings.HpCurrentPath.Hint: Actor data path used to read current HP, for example system.attributes.hp.value.
TBD.Settings.HpMaxPath.Name: Maximum HP data path
TBD.Settings.HpMaxPath.Hint: Actor data path used to read maximum HP, for example system.attributes.hp.max.
TBD.Settings.EnableAutomaticUpdates.Name: Enable automatic token updates
TBD.Settings.EnableAutomaticUpdates.Hint: When enabled, token art changes automatically when configured actor HP changes.
TBD.Settings.RevertOnHealing.Name: Revert image when healed
TBD.Settings.RevertOnHealing.Hint: When enabled, tokens can move back to healthier images, including their original image.
TBD.Settings.IncludeDefeatedImage.Name: Include 0 HP / defeated image
TBD.Settings.IncludeDefeatedImage.Hint: When enabled, a stage covering exactly 0% HP can be used.
TBD.Settings.OnlyGmUpdates.Name: Only GM updates token art
TBD.Settings.OnlyGmUpdates.Hint: When enabled, only the first active GM performs automatic token image changes.
TBD.Settings.RefreshCombatTracker.Name: Refresh combat tracker after image update
TBD.Settings.RefreshCombatTracker.Hint: Render the combat tracker after token art changes. Leave off unless another tracker module needs it.
TBD.Settings.DebugLogging.Name: Debug logging
TBD.Settings.DebugLogging.Hint: Write detailed Token Battle Damage messages to the browser console.
TBD.ActorConfig.Title: Configure Battle Damage Art
TBD.ActorConfig.Enabled: Enable battle damage for this actor
TBD.ActorConfig.TokenizerDetected: Tokenizer is active. Use the normal image picker to select Tokenizer-created images.
TBD.ActorConfig.RestoredOriginals: Restored original image for {count} active token(s).
